data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for booking-time or pre-check-in signatures.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Booking-time signature or pre-check-in signature', but the provided evidence does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of these signatures. While the linked use case mentions the need for these signatures, there are no concrete checks or validations performed that would allow for a definitive conclusion. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure or satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of booking-time signature or pre-check-in signature being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for booking-time or pre-check-in signatures.
